chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD R.A No. 150 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders as to N.P of R.A as counsel for applicant has not complied with the office objection since its presentation. 19.10.2016. None present. -.-.-. On last date of hearing another chance was given to the applicant’s counsel to comply with the office objection but today office note shows that the office objection has not been complied with since presentation of this Revision Application. Consequently, the present Revision Application, as observed in the earlier order, is dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith pending application(s). JUDGE Ali Haider
